title: change of objective
wikitext: []: [Spoilers] change of objective?             Quote Post by jackysee » Wed May 08, 2013 9:42 pm Q is now screening in our city and I have watched it twice. In the subtitle (chinese), something has caught my attention. It's the mentioning of "kill god"/deicide (弒神). It appear in these three lines: 00:14:30 {Misato} The power to kill gods... I'll see what it can do. --- 00:24:15 {Ritsuko} So this is the power to kill gods. 00:24:17 {Ritsuko} Wunder. Truly the ship of hope. -- 01:17:12 {Gendo} The long desired Human Instrumentality Project, 01:17:15 {Gendo} and the inevitable deicide, will be completed by me.

Article: change of objective
[]: [Spoilers] change of objective?             Quote Post by jackysee » Wed May 08, 2013 9:42 pm Q is now screening in our city and I have watched it twice. In the subtitle (chinese), something has caught my attention. It's the mentioning of "kill god"/deicide (弒神). It appear in these three lines: 00:14:30 {Misato} The power to kill gods... I'll see what it can do. --- 00:24:15 {Ritsuko} So this is the power to kill gods. 00:24:17 {Ritsuko} Wunder. Truly the ship of hope. -- 01:17:12 {Gendo} The long desired Human Instrumentality Project, 01:17:15 {Gendo} and the inevitable deicide, will be completed by me.
